description: An operator analyzes energy output and soiling data from solar panels on city buildings to schedule cleanings only when needed.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve power output and soiling sensor data from the city's solar panel arrays.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the performance data for all solar assets.

nodes.task_description: Identify panels where energy output has dropped by more than 10% due to soiling.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of solar arrays that require cleaning.

nodes.task_description: Create work orders for the maintenance crew to clean only the identified, underperforming panels.

expected_outcome.value: Agent schedules cleanings based on condition rather than a fixed schedule.
